title: SimpleRanks
description: A simple minecraft rank plugin to create/manage/customize ranks
body:
# SimpleRanks
SimpleRanks is an simple rank plugin wich allows you to easily manage, create and edit ranks and permission on your own minecraft server. You can create anything you want, any color you want.

**Wiki:** https://github.com/Silal123/SimpleRanks/wiki

### Features:
- create custom ranks
- assign ranks to players
- custom chat format for messages
- create custom join or quit messages
- assign ranks to groups with permissions
- PlaceholderAPI support
